recommendations.title: The Other Sister
recommendations.overview: A mentally challenged girl proves herself to be every bit as capable as her "perfect" sister when she moves into an apartment and begins going to college.

recommendations.title: Nothing in Common
recommendations.overview: A successful advertising executive finds his freewheeling life crashing to a halt when his parents end their longtime marriage.

recommendations.title: Valentine's Day
recommendations.overview: Intertwining couples and singles in Los Angeles break-up and make-up based on the pressures and expectations of Valentine's Day.

recommendations.title: New Year's Eve
recommendations.overview: The lives of several couples and singles in New York intertwine over the course of New Year's Eve.

recommendations.title: Beaches
recommendations.overview: A privileged rich debutante and a cynical struggling entertainer share a turbulent, but strong childhood friendship over the years.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Bridesmaids
recommendations.overview: Two women plot revenge against the woman marrying their friend's ex-boyfriend.
